hero.subtagline: I build websites so your business gets found, trusted, and chosen.
hero.wa_message: Hi, I'd like to know more about Calo Lab's services.

services.title: Services
services.s1_for: For entrepreneurs and freelancers who need to get online fast.
services.s1_wa: Hi, I'm interested in the Showcase Site from Calo Lab.
services.s2_for: For businesses that need a complete, standout digital presence.
services.s2_wa: Hi, I'm interested in the Complete Site from Calo Lab.
services.s3_for: For those who want a professional brand before launching their site.
services.s3_wa: Hi, I'm interested in the Branding package from Calo Lab.

process.title: How it works
process.p1_desc: You tell me about your business, what you sell and who you want to reach. Simple as that.
process.p2_desc: I send a proposal with the structure, timeline and price. We start only when you confirm.
process.p3_desc: I handle the design and code while you follow along. You can ask for adjustments along the way.
process.p4_desc: You get your site's link, ready to share. Support included for 15 days.

why.title: Why Calo Lab
why.w1_desc: Experience from large tech companies, now applied to your business. Agency-level quality without the agency price.
why.w2_desc: No teams, no middlemen. The person who understands your project is me, from start to finish.
why.w3_desc: You know exactly what you'll pay before we start. No hidden fees, no extras at the end.
why.w4_desc: I work with timelines that are actually met. You know what happens at every step.
